name: Desview T12S Protable Teleprompter Camera
description: Use a DSLR or mirrorless camera to film content for social media or streaming broadcast with the script-reading capabilities of a teleprompter with the T12S 12.9" Portable Teleprompter for Smartphone/Tablets with Remote Control from Desview.

features.Key Features :: For Smartphones or Tablets up to 12.9" | Foldable Design with Sun Hood & Mount | iOS and Android App | 70/30 Beamsplitter Glass | Bluetooth Remote | Includes Carry Case
features.What's in The Box :: Desview T12S 12.9" Portable Teleprompter for Smartphone/Tablets with Remote Control | Baseplate with Tablet Clip | Adjustable Camera Riser Plate | Beamsplitter Glass | Sun Hood | Remote Control | Cleaning Cloth | Carry Case
